aiAudit.title: AI Maturity Audit
aiAudit.description: Assess your enterprise's automation potential in 2 minutes.

questions.text: How would you describe your volume of unstructured data (emails, documents, reports)?

options.text: Low: Everything is handled manually without friction
Moderate: We starting to lose time searching for info
High: It's a daily bottleneck

questions.text: What portion of your team's time is dedicated to repetitive tasks?

options.text: Less than 25%
Between 25% and 50%
More than 50%

questions.text: Is your customer or internal support often overwhelmed?

options.text: Never, we are very responsive
Sometimes, with stress peaks
Yes, response times are too long

questions.text: What is your level of Cloud tool usage (M365, Slack, Salesforce)?

options.text: Limited: We use little cloud software
Standard: We use M365/Google Workspace
Advanced: We use multiple interconnected SaaS

questions.text: Is your company ready to invest in AI this year?

options.text: We are just exploring
It's a strategic priority

questions.text: Where is the majority of your operational data stored?

options.text: Local Silos (Excel files, physical hard drives)
Mixed (Local server and some Cloud applications)
Centralized Cloud ecosystem with API access

questions.text: What is the current level of AI adoption within your teams?

options.text: None: We do not use any AI tools
Informal: Some employees use ChatGPT individually
Structured: We have integrated AI policies and tools

questions.text: How would you describe the complexity of your core business processes?

options.text: Linear: Simple data entry and administrative tasks
Variable: Requires basic sorting and human judgment
Complex: Requires cross-analysis of multiple sources

benefits.title: Architecture Built for Your Reality
benefits.p1: We don't believe in generic solutions. Every industry has its own regulatory constraints, security imperatives, and production rhythms.
benefits.p2: Whether you are on a construction site or in a financial services firm, we integrate AI and IT infrastructure as a strategic lever, not a technical burden.
benefits.p3: Our approach combines sectoral expertise and technological innovation to create resilient environments that propel your growth.

testimonial.quote: Stigma Technologies has transformed our approach to safety on our sites using AI. They are more than an IT vendor; they are a strategic partner who understands the real challenges of construction.
testimonial.author: Jean-François Moreau

questions.title: Industry-Specific FAQ
questions.p1: Technological integration raises questions specific to each profession. We are here to answer them with clarity and precision.
questions.p2: Here are the most common concerns we address during our sectoral audits.

items.q: How do you ensure compliance with data protection laws (Law 25/GDPR)?
items.a: We integrate compliance by design (Privacy by Design) with regular audits and state-of-the-art encryption systems.

items.q: Can your AI solutions work offline on remote sites?
items.a: Yes, we deploy 'Edge Computing' solutions that allow local data processing without relying on a stable internet connection.

items.q: Do your systems integrate with our existing business software (ERP, BIM)?
items.a: Absolutely. Our architects specialize in system interoperability to ensure a smooth data flow between your tools.

managedIt.title: Managed & Autonomous IT Intelligence
managedIt.description: Go beyond traditional support. Our agentic ecosystem ensures absolute resilience and self-healing maintenance.

benefits.title: Predictable Scale with Managed Continuity
benefits.p1: We no longer just maintain the existing; we orchestrate intelligence. Our MIP (Managed Intelligence Provider) model transforms your infrastructure into an autonomous asset.
benefits.p2: With our Stigma Agentic Stack, your systems don't just run—they self-diagnose. Our agents collaborate with your teams to eliminate technical debt.
benefits.p3: By leveraging Stigma Sentinel for maintenance and Stigma Assist for support, you gain total freedom. We guarantee your technology foundation is audit-ready and resilient to any market disruption.

contactForm.title: Operational Excellence for Your SMB
contactForm.description: Our dedicated experts manage your infrastructure 24/7 so you can focus on your growth.

expertise.title: Proactive Management of Your IT Ecosystem
expertise.description: We don't just fix problems; we optimize your infrastructure for growth.

strategy.title: Level 2: Human Expertise (vCIO)
strategy.description: Complex strategic consulting, architecture, and business vision driven by our senior consultants to align AI with your goals.

testimonial.quote: Since partnering with Stigma Technologies for our IT management, our system uptime has been flawless and our IT costs have become entirely predictable. They aren't just a vendor; they are a critical extension of our executive team.
testimonial.author: Sarah Jenkins

cloud-backup-disaster-recovery.title: Cloud Backup & Disaster Recovery
cloud-backup-disaster-recovery.description: The threat landscape facing your data is exploding. From natural disasters and system failures to human error and malicious attacks, your business continuity depends on recovery services that keep you protected and running 24x7. We provide comprehensive, flawlessly delivered DRaaS (Disaster Recovery as a Service) and BaaS (Backup as a Service) solutions.
features: Fully Managed Disaster Recovery as a Service (DRaaS)
Cloud, Virtual, and Physical Backup as a Service (BaaS)
Secure Backup for Microsoft 365 and SaaS Platforms
Automated Failover Minimizing Downtime and Data Loss

benefits.title: Stay Protected with Comprehensive Crisis Management
benefits.p1: Thwart disasters of any kind and ensure your critical data is always available and protected. We don't just provide storage; our strategic consultants work with you to develop and test comprehensive business continuity plans.
benefits.p2: By combining cutting-edge infrastructure with managed recovery, we take your disaster recovery to new levels, allowing you to expect the unexpected and keep your business moving forward confidently.

steps.title: Strategic Assessment
steps.description: We analyze your infrastructure, data criticality, and regulatory requirements to define customized RPO and RTO metrics.

steps.title: Resilient Architecture
steps.description: Implementation of immutable, air-gapped storage and automated failover protocols tailored to your specific ecosystem.

steps.title: Continuous Testing
steps.description: We don't wait for a disaster. We conduct regular, non-disruptive DR simulations to guarantee recovery readiness.

network-management.title: Enterprise Network Management
network-management.description: We architect and maintain high-performance networks that serve as the nervous system of your digital enterprise. From SD-WAN to global VPN infrastructures, we ensure security and speed at every node.

benefits.title: Uninterrupted Digital Operations
benefits.p1: Your network is the foundation of your digital initiatives. We ensure it's not simply running, but critically optimized to eliminate bottlenecks and latency for your global workforce.
benefits.p2: With continuous monitoring and proactive threat mitigation at the edge, we transform your network from a vulnerability into a strategic, highly resilient corporate asset.

steps.title: Infrastructure Audit
steps.description: Comprehensive mapping of your existing topology to identify latency bottlenecks, security gaps, and obsolete legacy hardware.

steps.title: Modernization & Deployment
steps.description: Seamless rollout of SD-WAN, next-gen firewalls, and optimized routing paths with zero operational disruption to your team.

steps.title: Continuous Optimization
steps.description: Real-time traffic analysis and automated failover adjustments to dynamically maintain peak performance during high-load periods.

endpoint-resilience.title: Endpoint Resilience & Security
endpoint-resilience.description: The modern perimeter is your employee's laptop. We secure every device in your fleet with automated management, advanced threat protection, and real-time response capabilities.

benefits.title: Empower a Secure, Hybrid Workforce
benefits.p1: As your team distributes globally, the traditional firewall is no longer sufficient. We push enterprise-grade security directly to the devices your team relies on daily.
benefits.p2: By automating device compliance, patches, and threat isolation, we drastically reduce IT tickets and eliminate the friction between stringent corporate security and seamless end-user productivity.

steps.title: Zero-Touch Provisioning
steps.description: Devices are shipped directly to employees worldwide, automatically configuring applications, policies, and VPNs on first boot.

steps.title: Automated Vanguard
steps.description: Silent background deployment of critical security patches and enterprise applications without disrupting user workflows.

steps.title: Active Response
steps.description: In the event of anomalous behavior, our EDR systems instantly quarantine the affected device, protecting the broader network.

cloud-administration.title: Cloud Administration & Governance
cloud-administration.description: Stop overpaying for underutilized cloud resources. We provide expert, hands-on management for AWS, Azure, and Google Cloud, focusing relentlessly on performance optimization, security compliance, and comprehensive cost containment.

benefits.title: Transform Cloud Chaos into Predictable ROI
benefits.p1: Cloud migration is just the beginning. Without active governance, cloud environments rapidly spiral into complex, costly ecosystems full of security blind spots.
benefits.p2: We act as your dedicated cloud operations team, applying FinOps and SecOps principles to ensure every dollar spent directly contributes to scalable performance and rigorous security.

steps.title: FinOps Audit
steps.description: Deep-dive analysis of your current cloud spend to identify zombie instances, over-provisioned resources, and architectural inefficiencies.

steps.title: Security Hardening
steps.description: Implementation of least-privilege IAM, encryption at rest, and automated compliance checks against industry benchmarks.

steps.title: Automated Governance
steps.description: Deployment of self-healing infrastructure rules and dynamic cost-allocation alerts to prevent future architectural drift.

procurement-assets.title: IT Procurement & Asset Management
procurement-assets.description: Maximize the value of every technology investment. We handle the entire end-to-end lifecycle of your IT assets, from strategic vendor selection and bulk procurement to compliance tracking and secure decommissioning.

benefits.title: Eliminate Bloat and Maintain Compliance
benefits.p1: Managing hardware and software licenses across a distributed workforce is a logistical nightmare. We centralize procurement, ensuring you only pay for what you use and need.
benefits.p2: From leveraging global buying power for hardware discounts to reclaiming unused software licenses automatically, we turn asset management from a chaotic chore into a streamlined cost-saver.

steps.title: Inventory Baseline
steps.description: Thorough discovery of all physical hardware and SaaS licenses to create a unified, accurate digital 'Single Source of Truth'.

steps.title: Optimization Strategy
steps.description: Reclaiming unused software seats and standardizing hardware profiles by role to maximize bulk buying power.

steps.title: Lifecycle Automation
steps.description: Establishing predictive timelines for hardware replacements and automated alerts for upcoming warrantee expirations.

it-strategy-vcio.title: IT Strategy & vCIO Services
it-strategy-vcio.description: Technology should be a primary growth engine, not merely a cost center. Our Virtual Chief Information Officer (vCIO) services provide the executive-level technical leadership necessary to align your IT roadmap flawlessly with your business's 3-to-5-year vision.

benefits.title: Executive Insight Without Executive Overhead
benefits.p1: Scaling companies often lack deep technical leadership at the executive table, leading to misaligned technology investments and stalled growth initiatives.
benefits.p2: We bring decades of CIO-level experience directly into your board meetings, translating complex technical challenges into clear business decisions, budgets, and actionable long-term strategies.

steps.title: Business Discovery
steps.description: Deep engagement with your executive team to understand revenue goals, operational challenges, and market differentiators.

steps.title: Roadmap Generation
steps.description: Developing a multi-year technology plan encompassing budgeting, resource allocation, and key digital transformation milestones.

steps.title: Ongoing Leadership
steps.description: Conducting quarterly strategic reviews to adjust to pivoting market conditions and ensuring technology projects stay on track and under budget.

odoo.title: Odoo ERP
odoo.description: Odoo is a suite of business applications covering all your company needs: from CRM and e-commerce to accounting, inventory, and beyond.

benefits.title: One platform, infinite possibilities
benefits.p1: As a specialized partner, we help you implement and customize Odoo to fit your business processes perfectly.
benefits.p2: No more data silos. With Odoo, every department works on the same base, ensuring total consistency and increased efficiency.

steps.title: Training & Support

benefits.title: Unleash your industrial potential
benefits.p1: ERPNext offers a 360-degree view of your business, from supply chain to final billing.
benefits.p2: Thanks to its modular architecture, you only pay for what you need, while keeping the ability to grow without technical limits.

steps.title: Mapping
steps.description: Definition of workflows and control points.

steps.title: Cloud Deployment

steps.title: Pure Optimization
steps.description: Final adjustments and automation of recurring tasks.

microsoft-365.description: Go beyond simple emails. Microsoft 365 combines the best productivity apps with powerful cloud services, enhanced security, and unmatched collaboration capabilities.

benefits.title: Work smart, anywhere
benefits.p1: We don't just sell licenses. We orchestrate your environment to ensure your data is secure and your team is efficient.
benefits.p2: Benefit from expert administration that optimizes your costs and ensures every feature is configured according to industry best practices.

steps.title: Tenant Audit

features: Collaborative editing on Docs, Sheets, Slides

benefits.title: Unleash your team's creativity
benefits.p1: Google Workspace removes barriers to collaboration. Multiple users can edit the same document simultaneously, regardless of their location.
benefits.p2: Our expertise helps you secure this open workflow, implementing granular access controls and Data Loss Prevention (DLP).

steps.title: Cloud Native Strategy
steps.description: Aligning your collaboration tools with your agile company culture.

steps.title: Assisted Migration

steps.title: Change Training
steps.description: Workshops to maximize adoption of collaboration tools by your employees.

azure.description: Harness the power of the Microsoft cloud to transform your business. From server migration to artificial intelligence, Azure offers limitless scalability.

benefits.title: Unprecedented Agility
benefits.p1: As Azure experts, we help you navigate cloud complexity to reap only the benefits.
benefits.p2: Optimize your spending and boost performance with an infrastructure that scales with your real business needs.

steps.title: Audit & Design

steps.title: Migration
steps.description: Smooth and secure deployment on the Microsoft infrastructure.

steps.title: Governance

questions.title: Modern IT for Modern Scale
questions.p1: Managed Services is not just about keeping the lights on. It's about building a predictable, scalable infrastructure that removes technical debt and allows your team to focus on core business innovation.
questions.p2: We integrate deeply with your existing teams, acting as an extension of your organization. Every initiative is benchmarked against reliability, security, and measurable ROI.

items.q: How does Managed IT reduce my operational risk?
items.a: By introducing 24/7 monitoring, automated patching, and immutable backups, we shift your posture from reactive 'break-fix' to a state of continuous operational readiness.

items.q: Can we scale our support as we grow?
items.a: Absolutely. Our infrastructure is designed to be elastic. Whether you are adding 10 or 100 employees, our support frameworks scale without friction.

items.q: What about my existing legacy systems?
items.a: We specialize in 'bridging' legacy infrastructure with modern cloud solutions, ensuring you gain the benefits of modernization without the risks of total rebuilds.

managedCybersecurity.title: Autonomous Cybersecurity & Agentic Defense
managedCybersecurity.description: Neutralize cyber threats in milliseconds with our Stigma Guardian autonomous defense ecosystem across your entire fleet.

benefits.title: Transform Reactive Defense into Proactive Resilience
benefits.p1: We are shifting from static perimeter defense to autonomous resilience. Our Stigma Agentic Stack transforms every endpoint into an intelligent guardian.
benefits.p2: With Stigma Guardian (powered by SentinelOne), zero-day threats are eradicated in milliseconds. Unlike traditional support, AI decides and acts before any human impact.
benefits.p3: Stigma SecOps then takes over to correlate incidents across Microsoft 365 and your networks, while our Elite Human SOC team intervenes on the most complex cases.

contactForm.title: Secure Your Digital Sovereignty
contactForm.description: Our SOC analysts monitor your critical assets in real-time to neutralize threats before impact.

steps.title: Threat Discovery
steps.description: Continuous 24/7 scanning of network traffic and log behavior using advanced SIEM and XDR telemetry to identify anomalies.

steps.title: Security Remediation
steps.description: Immediate automated containment of suspicious activity followed by deep-dive investigation by our senior security analysts.

steps.title: Defense Hardening
steps.description: Application of tactical lessons learned to update firewall rules and security policies, proactively immunizing your stack against future iterations.

testimonial.quote: The peace of mind knowing Stigma's SOC is monitoring our infrastructure 24/7/365 is invaluable. They've stopped multiple credential-stuffing attacks before they could impact us.
testimonial.author: David Thorne

expertise.title: Multi-Layered Enterprise Defense
expertise.description: A holistic approach to securing your most valuable digital assets.

soc.title: Level 0: Stigma Guardian
soc.description: Autonomous MDR defense that neutralizes threats instantly on the device (via SentinelOne) without human intervention needed.

vulnerability.title: Level 1: Stigma SecOps
vulnerability.description: Agentic investigation powered by Purple AI. Real-time alert triage and threat correlation across your entire cloud ecosystem.

awareness.title: Level 2: Elite Cyber Experts
awareness.description: Strategic human intervention for complex remediation and advanced forensics by our SOC experts (powered by Blackpoint).

capabilities.title: Holistic Defense Framework

grc.title: Compliance Services & Digital Sovereignty

benefits.title: From Static Compliance to Continuous RegOps
benefits.p1: Manual compliance management (SOC2, HIPAA, Loi 25) is slow, expensive, and often obsolete the moment an audit ends. This traditional approach leaves your business vulnerable to cyber risks and regulatory fines.
benefits.p2: We pivot your model to 'RegOps' (Regulatory Operations). By automating evidence collection and control monitoring, we ensure your security posture is robust 365 days a year, not just on audit day.
benefits.p3: Whether you are aiming for SOC2 Type II certification or need to meet strict Loi 25 requirements in Quebec, we architect solutions that guarantee data residency while optimizing internal processes through intelligent automation.

benefits.p2: We build secure pipelines to adjust open-source or commercial models so they speak your business language while preserving the secrecy of your data.
benefits.p3: The result? Hyper-contextualized automation without sending your sensitive information to large Cloud providers. Your data remains yours.

benefits.title: Precision Meets Prevention
benefits.p1: Traditional rule-based systems generate too many false positives and miss emerging threats. Machine learning adapts to the evolving normality of your business.
benefits.p2: Our models isolate atypical statistical patterns in massive data environments (transactions, IoT sensors, network logs) for immediate intervention.
benefits.p3: The result? A drastic reduction in fraud losses and a shift from reactive maintenance to an optimized predictive strategy.

benefits.p3: The result? Instant access to institutional knowledge. Your experts find exactly what they're looking for, even if they don't know the exact terminology.

questions.title: Modern Infrastructure for Tomorrow's Demand
questions.p1: The cloud is no longer a destination; it's an operating model. Successful migration requires deep rethinking of how systems interact.
questions.p2: We specialize in 'Cloud Native' transformations, helping you leverage advanced scaling and automation patterns that legacy systems cannot match.

items.q: How do you ensure data sovereignty?
items.a: We implement private clouds and sovereign zones on public platforms, ensuring your data never leaves your specified jurisdiction.
Yes. We configure GPU clusters and optimized vector databases to ensure your infrastructure is never a bottleneck for your agents.

items.q: How does FinOps reduce our cloud spend?
items.a: By automating the shutdown of unused resources and selecting the most cost-effective instances, we typically reduce bills by 25%.

digitalTransformation.title: Digital Transformation
digitalTransformation.description: Overcome stagnation and outpace the competition. We bridge the gap between where you are and where you need to be in the digital-first economy.

benefits.title: Legacy is a Cost, Transformation is an Investment
benefits.p1: In the digital-first economy, the fastest-moving companies aren't just built on better ideas; they are built on more agile foundations.
benefits.p2: We help you shed the weight of monolithic systems. By modernizing your core, we turn your technology from a slow-moving utility into a high-speed innovation engine.
benefits.p3: We integrate modern API layers and scalable microservices to ensure your legacy data becomes a liquid asset. This architectural shift allows for rapid feature deployment and seamless cross-platform synchronization, directly increasing your organizational agility and market responsiveness.

contactForm.title: Modernize Your Core Business
contactForm.description: Overcome technical debt and gain agility with our CRM/ERP modernization frameworks.

steps.description: Continuous integration of new digital capabilities while maintaining institutional stability and security.

testimonial.quote: Stigma's transformation framework didn't just 'update' our software—it rebuilt our entire operational DNA. We're now shipping customer features 4x faster.
testimonial.author: Sarah Jenkins

expertise.title: Expertise in Enterprise Solutions
expertise.description: We specialize in the high-stakes integration and modernization of the core systems that power your business.

crm.title: CRM Integration
crm.description: We don't just connect tools; we architect your entire customer lifecycle. From deep-level Salesforce customizations and Microsoft Dynamics business logic to building bespoke CRM platforms, we ensure your sales, marketing, and support teams operate from a single, high-fidelity source of truth.

erp.title: ERP Solutions
erp.description: Streamline your entire back-office with enterprise-grade resource planning. We specialize in the deployment and optimization of SAP, Oracle, and NetSuite environments. Our approach focuses on breaking down organizational silos and automating complex supply chain workflows.

modernization.title: System Modernization
modernization.description: Legacy systems shouldn't be a liability. We perform 'surgical' modernization of technical debt, migrating monolithic applications to agile, microservices-based architectures. We ensure your core infrastructure gains the scalability and security required for the digital era.

capabilities.title: Transformation Framework
capabilities.description: A holistic approach to modernizing your operations, customer experience, and technological foundation.

items.title: Legacy Modernization
items.description: Transform outdated systems into agile, cloud-native applications that drive business value.

items.title: Operational Efficiency
items.description: Streamline workflows and eliminate bottlenecks through intelligent automation and integration.

items.title: Cloud Native Adoption

items.title: Agile Culture
items.description: Empower your teams with the mindsets and tools needed for continuous innovation.

questions.title: Evolution, Not Just Implementation
questions.p1: Digital transformation is 20% about the technology and 80% about your people and processes. We focus on building the infrastructure that allows your business to adapt and thrive.
questions.p2: From containerizing your applications to redefining your customer touchpoints, we ensure that every digital initiative is measured against hard business results.

items.q: What is the ROI of Digital Transformation?
items.a: ROI is found in three areas: direct cost savings through automation, increased revenue through better customer experiences, and long-term viability.

story.title: Our Manifesto
story.p1: Forged in the necessity of securing increasingly complex environments, Stigma Technologies was born from an absolute conviction: technology infrastructure must no longer be a cost center, but an enterprise's most powerful engine for innovation.
story.p2: Since our inception, we have refused compromises. Our approach to systems architecture and cybersecurity is akin to precision engineering, built to ensure complete sovereign control of your data and the continuous operations of your business.
story.p3: Today, sustained by methodical growth, we assemble a world-class technological strike force, deploying digital resilience across the industry.

mission.title: Mission
mission.description: We position technology at the neural center of your strategy. By providing impenetrable technological foundations, we unlock your potential for market dominance.

rationality.title: Architectural Precision
rationality.description: We design ecosystems founded on hard data and relentless logic. No generic assumptions, only targeted engineering.

initiative.title: Tactical Vigilance
initiative.description: An uninterrupted defensive and proactive posture. We anticipate critical vulnerabilities through prevention and continuous monitoring before they even exist.

innovation.title: Applied Vanguard
innovation.description: We don't merely implement theoretical novelties. We industrialize AI and Cloud technologies for direct, massive, and measurable operational impact.

expertise.title: Proven under pressure. Engineered for excellence.
expertise.description: Our cloud architects and cybersecurity experts don't just configure software; they erect impenetrable digital fortresses.

items.question: Is this first contact free and without obligation?
items.answer: Yes, absolutely. By filling out this form, you are simply starting a conversation. Our team will reach out to understand your needs, with no commitment required.

items.question: Is my information confidential?
items.answer: Yes, we strictly comply with Law 25 and the most rigorous security protocols. Your data is encrypted and protected.

items.question: What is the response time?
items.answer: We commit to responding within a maximum of 24 business hours.
